title: dryopteris unita
intro: Dryopteris unita, also known as the Royal Fern, is a perennial plant native to tropical and subtropical regions of the Americas. It is a member of the Dryopteridaceae family and is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant has been used to treat various health conditions, such as arthritis, wounds, and digestive issues, due to its health benefits of reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and regulating gut health. Herbal preparations of Dryopteris unita include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
